---
title: "telemetry.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/live/telemetry.ts"
loc: 27
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.15
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 6.81
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 17 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Request](file://express)
- [Response](file://express)
- [SubspaceRelay](file://./socket.ts)
- [recordPing](file://./recorder.ts)
- [recordTrace](file://./recorder.ts)
- [AgentPing](file://../types.ts)

### Exports
- `normalizePath`
- `normalizePath`
- `handleTelemetryPing`
- `handleTelemetryPing`
- `ping`
- `handleTelemetryTrace`
- `handleTelemetryTrace`
- `trace`
